source_intake_record.raw_question_text: As shown in the figure, $AD \parallel BE \parallel CF$, where points $B, E$ are on $AC, DF$ respectively, $\frac{AB}{BC} = \frac{2}{3}, EF = 6$. What is the length of $DE$?
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text:
\textbf{Solution:} Since $AD\parallel BE\parallel CF$, \\
it follows that $\frac{AB}{BC}=\frac{DE}{FE}$, \\
thus $DE=\boxed{4}$
